retrieved_result: What are the different types of outline? Answer by J. E. S. Hays Confidence votes 79.6KWordsmith, world-builder, author Supervisors: this is part of a learning hub on writing effectively. Please do not delete answers or alternate questions. The most common type of outline is called the Alphanumeric Outline. Alpha as in alphabet and Numeric
